name: Grilled Chicken W/Tandoori Spices
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chicken pieces.
2. Place the pieces in a glass bowl.
3. Mix all the remaining ingredients together.
4. Pour this marinade over the chicken.
5. Let stand for 6 hours.
6. Prepare the grill - it is NOT ready until ALL the coals have a THICK coating of gray ash.
7. Remove the chicken from the marinade.
8. Grill 4 to 6 inches from the coals, turning occasionally, until all the pieces are cooked through (30 to 45 minutes).
9. Serve hot.
